claim: Use Instagram for trend spotting and sharing experiences, as it is the primary platform for premium diners to discover new venues and chef profiles
why_it_works: Premium diners are heavy social media users who share experiences and look for trend spotting on platforms like Instagram

claim: List your premium dining venue on Zomato to leverage ratings and photos for discovery, especially for chef-driven venues
why_it_works: Even premium diners rely on ratings and photos for discovery of new venues

claim: Leverage WhatsApp for high-trust micro-word-of-mouth in closed groups and sometimes for direct reservations with hotels
why_it_works: WhatsApp is used for high-trust micro-word-of-mouth in closed groups, which is important for premium diners
